description: Schema for WPT expectation files. Each file represents a test suite and mirrors the WPT directory structure.
title: WPT expectation schema

expectationNode.description: A directory level in the WPT test tree. Keys are subdirectory or test file names.

expectationEntry.description: An entry for a directory or test file.

oneOf.description: true = all subtests pass; false = entire test file expected to fail

testExpectation.description: Fine-grained expectation for a test file.

ignore.description: If true, skip this test entirely (override with --no-ignore)

expectedFailures.description: Subtest names expected to fail; all others should pass

flaky.description: If true, retry test up to 3 times before marking as failed
